title: -27. The Next Thing to Bet[ ... words ]
content:
To continue serving our readers, I have removed Korean novels due to copyright issues.

Thank you for your continued support. I'm still working hard to bring you more great novels and the best reading experience possible.

“There’s no need for any more bluffing. Let’s go open.”

At the top player’s signal, the three hands were revealed.

The top player had the Ten and Nine of Hearts.

The woman had the King of Hearts and Queen of Diamonds.

The man in the back left had the Ace of Spades and Queen of Clubs.

At this point, the man in the back left seemed slightly ahead.

The dealer revealed the first three community cards: Two of Diamonds, Seven of Spades, and Ten of Clubs. This improved the top player’s position.

Everyone’s attention turned to the fourth card: Five of Clubs.

“Looks like this one’s mine?”

The top player smiled fearlessly and glanced at the woman, but she kept her eyes on the fifth card.

The fifth card revealed was the Ace of Hearts.

The winner was the man in the back left with a pair of Aces.

The victorious man clenched his fist in celebration. The spectators were even more excited than he was.

“Oh dear, I lost again.”

The woman had lost once more and was still staring at the five cards laid out in front of her.

“Too bad. But a deal’s a deal. Time to take off your underwear.”

The woman snapped her fingers once, then reached into her chest and smoothly pulled out a crimson bra. She slightly lifted her hips, slipped her hand under her dress, and removed the matching crimson panties.

“I’ve taken them off.”

She placed the removed underwear on the table in front of her like chips.

“That belongs to him now.”

The top player jerked his chin toward the man who had just won. The woman turned toward him and passed her underwear over the man sitting to her left, handing it directly to the winner in the back left.

The moment it happened, some of the spectators behind us moved away, while more gathered on the left side. These guys were so easy to read. Tch, I should’ve looked a little longer…

“Well then, this isn’t the end, right?”

The top player asked with a nasty grin. His smile was unpleasant, but even worse were the expressions of the man to my right and the man sitting to the woman’s left. The man in the back left seemed satisfied with the underwear he had just obtained and wasn’t even paying attention to the conversation. The others were different. Of course, I didn’t show it on my face, but I was expecting something too.

“Yes, let’s play one more round.”

The moment the woman agreed to continue, loud cheers erupted around us.

However, when it came time for what she would bet next after losing her underwear, the men suddenly fell silent.

“So, what are you betting this time?”

“Let’s see… I’ve already lost my underwear…”

The woman sitting next to me was no longer wearing anything underneath. From where I and the men beside her were sitting, the full shape of her breasts and even the outline of her nipples were visible. Depending on the tavern’s lighting, others might not see it clearly, but anyone with good eyesight could definitely make it out.

What was even more impressive was that even without a bra, the shape of her breasts hadn’t changed at all. That meant they were firm and beautifully shaped. Everyone present understood just how amazing her chest was. Because of that, everyone waited eagerly for her next words.

“Let me touch those tits!”

The sudden suggestion didn’t come from any of us sitting at the table. It was shouted by one of the spectators who had crowded close.

“No, take off that dress!”

“Start a strip show right here!”

Starting with one man’s proposal, the male spectators began spitting out their desires one after another. The noise grew so loud that it became impossible to tell who was saying what, and the situation spiraled out of control.

“Shut the hell up!!!”

At that moment, the man to my right roared, instantly silencing the crowd.

“You guys are nothing but spectators! If you want to touch her tits that badly, put up your own money and pay for it!”

It was an extremely reasonable argument. No one else dared to make any more suggestions. Attention returned to the woman, who simply smiled and answered without concern:

“If you want to touch my breasts, how much are you willing to bet?”

Her proposal drew loud cheers from the spectators.

Just as the top player was about to answer first, I clearly declared.
